steps.title: Count at least fifty
steps.content: Combine the rows for ages $50$ through $69$: $$13+11+7+3=34$$

steps.title: Count at least sixty
steps.content: Only the $60$-$64$ and $65$-$69$ rows meet the higher cutoff: $$7+3=10$$

steps.title: Form the fraction
steps.content: So the requested fraction is $$\frac{10}{34}$$ The answer is B.
